title: Coerce Boolean to Integer
cap_description: Convert a boolean to an integer (true=1, false=0)
documentation:
## Purpose

Converts a boolean value to an integer: `true` becomes `1`, `false` becomes `0`. Use this when a downstream cap expects an integer flag or count but the upstream produces a boolean.

## Inputs

A boolean value (media type `media:bool;textable`).

## Outputs

The integer `1` (true) or `0` (false).

## Notes

- Standard boolean-to-int mapping used across most programming contexts.
- To widen further to a float, chain with [Coerce Integer to Number](https://capdag.com/browse/cap:in="media:integer;numeric;textable";op=coerce;out="media:numeric;textable").
